steps.t: The fox wants you to run north-east, up the small hill near his den. You should follow the fox and run east.
The fox wants you to run north. You should follow the fox and run north.
Cyneswith is in Edoras, waiting for her daughter to come home. You should bring Saburg to her mother Cyneswith.
Théolac is on the platform in western Edoras. You should return to Théolac and tell him that the missing girl has been found.
